case_title: SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY VS OLYMPIC MARKET

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLYMPIC MARKET
